title: CSharpier Configuration
description: Configuration file for CSharpier C# formatter (.csharpierrc.json)

printWidth.description: Soft line width at which the printer will wrap content

useTabs.description: Indent lines with tabs instead of spaces

indentSize.description: Number of spaces per indentation level (ignored when useTabs is true)

formatter.description: Formatter to use for matched files

printWidth.description: Override print width for matched files

useTabs.description: Override tab usage for matched files

indentSize.description: Override indent size for matched files

endOfLine.description: Override line ending for matched files
